zh.text: 双打发接发后的前三拍，业余球友最该先练哪一个选择？
AI 或训练记录能帮我看出哪些动作问题？
准备参加夏训，怎样判断课程有没有真正的反馈和进步路径？
接杀只能挡高，怎么练成挡网、抽挡和挑后场都有选择？
步法总慢半拍，是启动、到位还是回位的问题？
比赛领先后变保守，怎么用固定流程稳住节奏？
反手后场被连续压制时，先改步法、握拍还是击球点？
网前总被抢高点，放网、推扑和挑球应该怎么排序练？

en.text: In doubles, which choice after serve and return should amateur players train first?
What movement problems can AI or training notes help me notice?
How do I know whether a summer training program has real feedback and progress tracking?
How can I train smash defence so I can block, drive, and lift with purpose?
If my footwork is late, is the problem start, arrival, or recovery?
When I get conservative while leading, what routine can stabilize my rhythm?
When my rear-court backhand gets targeted, should I fix footwork, grip, or contact first?
If I lose the net early, how should I sequence net shots, pushes, and lifts in training?
